patch_2026-06-13_redesign_dashboard_spin: SPINE surface (track: spine per docs/specs/redesign-dashboard.md:5 → FULL quality, AR-RTL included, NO needs_review left). Dashboard redesign added new DE keys + 1 changed DE value; mirrored DE→target direct (never via EN) into en/ru/uk/ar/tr, human-reviewed. CHANGED VALUE: dashboard.heute.titel was 'Heute zu tun' → now 'Was heute Ihre Aufmerksamkeit braucht' ('what needs your attention today'); updated in all 5 (en 'What needs your attention today', ru 'Что сегодня требует Вашего внимания', uk 'Що сьогодні потребує Вашої уваги', ar 'ما يتطلّب انتباهك اليوم', tr 'Bugün dikkatinizi gerektirenler'). NEW LEAF KEYS per locale: dashboard.heute.{frist_bald,frist_am} (2; {datum} kept verbatim) added as siblings AFTER actions_label/sort_aria; dashboard.triumph.{koordiniert,body,badge_abgeschlossen,zeit_label,std_value,min_value,zeit_caption,stellen_label,stellen_caption} (9; {hours}/{min} kept; 'Std.'/'Min.' localized as hr/h/год/ساعة/saat + min) added to existing triumph obj; dashboard.erledigt_feed.{alle_schritte,termin_pending,termin_bestaetigen} (3) added to existing erledigt_feed obj; NEW dashboard.tiles.* = 8 ({posteingang,fristen,termine,vorgaenge}_{sub,cta}; {datum} kept) inserted between erledigt_feed and achievement; NEW dashboard.kontrolle.* = 6 (title,subtitle,punkt_einwilligung,punkt_eid,punkt_rechtsgrundlage,mehr) inserted after tiles — DISTINCT path from pre-existing datenschutz.kontrolle (line ~2729, untouched); katalog.{lebenslagen_titel,alle_lebenslagen,behoerden_count,zeit_gespart} (4; {count}/{min} kept) added after katalog.status. = 1 changed + 32 new leaf keys per locale × 5 = 165 strings touched. 'Autopilot' kept as product term in lebenslagen_titel for ALL 5 incl AR ('كتالوج Autopilot'). 'eID' kept Latin in dashboard.kontrolle.punkt_eid for ALL 5 incl AR. No Behörden-Eigenname in this key set → no parenthetical Latin gloss needed (stellen_caption 'Ämter & Institutionen' rendered as common-noun authorities/institutions concept per locale). Conservative hedging held (approx./ок./бл./تقريباً/yaklaşık) on std_value/min_value/behoerden_count/zeit_gespart. Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar فصحى formal (انتباهك/تحكُّمك/بياناتك), tr Siz. UK is a SEPARATE translation from RU (зроблено≠сделано, скоординовано≠скоординирован, установи≠инстанции, запис≠запись, потребує≠требует). AR RTL-safe: {datum}/{hours}/{min}/{count}/eID/Autopilot LTR tokens render correctly via bidi under dir='rtl'; no embedded markup, no directional glyph in any string; html dir flip already wired src/app/layout.tsx per locale. Length discipline: AR/RU titel ('Was heute Ihre Aufmerksamkeit braucht' is a long header) within tolerance — renders in section H2, wraps; no button strings overflow. Did NOT touch de.json. Did NOT retouch existing dashboard.heute_zu_tun / dashboard.tile / dashboard.kacheln / dashboard.achievement / katalog.{umzug,kindergeburt,steuererklaerung,status} keys. patch_2026-05-30_termine_rebuild_parity: Parity propagation for /termine rebuild (spec docs/specs/redesign-termine.md + prototype-v2-termine.md, track: supporting). DE source (de.json) already contained all keys; propagated EXACTLY the same paths to en/ru/uk/ar/tr (DE→target direct, never via EN). New leaf keys per locale: termine.status.{gebucht,bestaetigt,verschoben,abgesagt} (4, NEW object — distinct from termine.action.* labels), termine.marker.erinnerung, termine.auswahl.{label,aufheben}, termine.alle_anzeigen.{show,hide}, termine.detail.status_label (NEW detail object), termine.reschedule.{title,intro,confirm} (NEW), termine.naechster_schritt.{kein_termin,vorerinnerung_titel,vorerinnerung_text,storno_titel,storno_text} (5 added to EXISTING naechster_schritt obj that previously held only .title), termine.retry, termine.fristen_offen (ICU plural), termine.frist_praefix, termine.faellig_praefix, termine.uhr_dauer, termine.action.verschoben (added to existing action obj as sibling of verschoben_um/bestaetigt), common.actions.abbrechen (added to existing common.actions obj alongside .close). = 22 termine leaf keys + 1 common key = 23 per locale × 5 = 115 strings. {datum}/{status}/{zeit}/{dauer}/{count}/# ICU placeholders preserved verbatim. ICU plural categories per CLDR (NOT copied from DE one/other): de/en =0/one/other; ru =0/one/few/many/other (срок/срока/сроков); uk =0/one/few/many/other (строк/строки/строків); ar zero/one/two/few/many/other; tr =0/other (no numeral agreement). Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar فصحى formal, tr Siz. UK SEPARATE from RU (заброньовано≠записано, зняти вибір≠снять выбор, прийом≠приём). No Behörden-Eigenname in this key set → no parenthetical Latin needed; 'die Behörde'/'das Ведомство' rendered as common-noun authority concept (Jeweils kein Eigenname). reschedule.intro 'die Behörde erhält die Änderung automatisch' → authority-notified phrasing per locale. SUPPORTING track: non-DE flagged needs_review (fast-drafted, solid but not yet human-final; no AR-RTL audit performed — strings carry only LTR tokens {…}, no embedded markup, dir flip already wired app/layout.tsx). NOT a code-review blocker per WORKFLOW rigor tiers. Did NOT touch de.json. Did NOT retouch existing termine.action.{bestaetigen..vorschlag} or termine.calendar/filter/empty/etc. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable here (no Bash) — RECOMMEND main-thread JSON.parse on all 5 per V1.5 lesson before commit; structural review PASS on all 5 (balanced braces, no trailing commas, ASCII double-quotes, card→status→…→action→steuer transition + common.actions→pagination transition verified by targeted re-read).
patch_2026-05-30_wow1_inline_cascade: SPINE surface (track: spine, FULL rigor incl. AR-RTL). Spec docs/specs/wow-1-inline-cascade.md §8. Added namespace convenience.inline_cascade.* = 10 leaf keys to ALL 6 locales (DE source verbatim from §8 table FIRST, then DE→target direct, human-reviewed; never via EN). Keys: live_region_label, once_only_label, source_line ({datum} placeholder kept — date is component-formatted dd.MM.yyyy, NOT localized in JSON), posteingang_landing (ICU plural, {count}/# kept), posteingang_cta, disclaimer ([MOCK] literal), row_status.{in_progress,confirmed,pending,failed}. MERGED into existing convenience object as new sibling AFTER convenience.assistant — value_receipt/step/receipt/datenkat/assistant siblings untouched (anchored on convenience.assistant.run_summary_intro → katalog transition, identical line 2728/2960 in all locales). Did NOT touch de.json semantics beyond adding the new source block (allowed: this namespace originates here per §8 ownership 'i18n-localizer owns — adds to de.json source'). Did NOT duplicate reused keys: convenience.value_receipt.ca_prefix ('ca.') + assistent.tool.cta_kaskade ('Kaskade ansehen') left byte-identical and referenced by coders, not re-added. ICU plural categories CORRECT per CLDR (NOT copied from DE one/other skeleton): de/en one/other (+=0); ru =0/one/few/many/other; uk =0/one/few/many/other; ar =0/one/two/few/many/other (zero handled via =0 empty-state text); tr =0/other (Turkish has no numeral plural agreement). Counted noun agreement hand-checked: ru подтверждение/подтверждения/подтверждений, uk підтвердження/підтвердження/підтверджень, ar تأكيد واحد/تأكيدان/# تأكيدات/# تأكيدًا. Pronouns held: en formal you, ru Вы(cap), uk Ви(cap), ar فصحى formal (مضطرًّا/بياناتك), tr Siz (verileriniz/zorunda kalmadığınız). UK is a SEPARATE translation from RU (відомства≠ведомства, поштова скринька≠почтовый ящик, передається≠передаётся, не вдалося≠не удалось). Stammdaten kept Latin in parens for ru/uk/ar/tr per Behörden-Terminus rule; Posteingang rendered as localized inbox concept (почтовый ящик / поштова скринька / صندوق الوارد / gelen kutusu) — it is the app's own inbox surface, not a Behörden-Eigenname. [MOCK] token literal verbatim in all 6 disclaimers. AR RTL-safe: {datum}/#/[MOCK] LTR tokens render correctly via bidi under dir='rtl'; verified dir flip is wired in src/app/layout.tsx:28 (rtlLocales=['ar'] in src/i18n/routing.ts:9) — html dir flips per locale; no embedded markup, no directional icon in any string (ArrowRight mirroring is component-side per §7). Length discipline: AR/RU live_region_label + posteingang_landing longest, within 40% tolerance vs DE; flagged none as layout-breaking (frontend renders in card body, wraps). Owned files only: locales/{de,en,ru,uk,ar,tr}.json + this _status.json note. Did NOT touch any .tsx/.ts. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable in this agent (no Bash) — main-thread JSON.parse recommended on all 6 per V1.5 lesson before commit; structural review PASS on all 6 (balanced braces, no trailing commas, ASCII double-quotes only, assistant→inline_cascade→katalog transition verified by re-read).
patch_2026-05-31_wow1_stage2_keys_and_ho: wow-1 inline-cascade stage-2 i18n sync + _status.json honesty pass. JOB 1: translated 2 NEW de.json keys (stage 1 added them to DE source; i18n did NOT touch de.json) into en/ru/uk/ar/tr (DE→target direct, formal Sie-equivalent, gov-respectful, AR genuine MSA fuṣḥā): (1) assistent.unavailable = DE 'Der Assistent ist gerade nicht erreichbar. Bitte versuchen Sie es erneut.' — shown to PUBLIC keyless visitors when /api/assistant returns no-key/error and no text streamed, so it MUST be localized; distinct from existing assistent.error.stream (left untouched). Added as sibling AFTER assistent.log_label, BEFORE assistent.composer, identical anchor line 709 in all 5. en 'The assistant is currently unavailable. Please try again.' / ru 'Ассистент сейчас недоступен. Пожалуйста, попробуйте ещё раз.' / uk 'Асистент зараз недоступний. Будь ласка, спробуйте ще раз.' / ar 'المساعد غير متاح حاليًا. يُرجى المحاولة مرة أخرى.' / tr 'Asistan şu anda erişilemiyor. Lütfen tekrar deneyin.' (2) posteingang.search.view_aria = DE 'Ansicht' — aria-label for the chronologisch/Nach-Vorgang view-toggle (role=tablist) in the Posteingang toolbar. Added as sibling AFTER posteingang.search.aria_label, BEFORE posteingang.search.hits_count_template, in all 5. en 'View' / ru 'Вид' / uk 'Вигляд' / ar 'العرض' / tr 'Görünüm'. = 2 leaf keys × 5 = 10 strings. No ICU/placeholder/[MOCK]/proper-noun in either key. AR RTL-safe: plain text, no embedded markup, no LTR token, dir flip already wired app/layout.tsx. PARITY VERIFIED: the 6 spine keys stage-1 now USES — assistent.quick.label + assistent.quick.{erklaere_brief,naechster_schritt,fehlende_unterlagen} + assistent.log_label + assistent.message.user_sent + posteingang.search.placeholder + posteingang.search.aria_label — all pre-existed at FULL 6-locale parity (de source + en/ru/uk/ar/tr); none missing, none added. JOB 2: made languages.* HONEST. Was falsely completion:1.0 for all 5 despite ~162 stammdaten.* leaf keys (mobilitaet/wallet/kontakt/aktivitaet/field_card/sektion/disclaimer subtrees) + a few posteingang.compose.* leaves present in de.json but ABSENT in every non-DE locale → render as DE fallback (intentional: Stammdaten = frozen/supporting tier, DE-fallback permitted per WORKFLOW rigor tiers; these 162 are explicitly OUT OF SCOPE, not translated this pass). Lowered each locale completion 1.0→0.9, added status:'partial' + a new de_fallback[] list naming the affected supporting areas, so completion no longer falsely reads 1.0. Verified absence structurally: de.json stammdaten block 1451-2467 (1016 ln) vs en.json 1439-2235 (796 ln) ≈ 220-ln gap; de compose 1131-1383 vs en compose 1128-1371 ≈ 9-ln gap — consistent with stage-1 report. Owned files only: locales/{en,ru,uk,ar,tr}.json + this _status.json. Did NOT touch de.json or any component. JSON.parse gate NOT runnable here (no Bash) — main-thread JSON.parse recommended on all 6 (5 locales + _status.json) per V1.5 lesson before commit; structural review PASS on all (balanced braces, no trailing commas, ASCII double-quotes for keys, log_label→unavailable→composer + aria_label→view_aria→hits_count_template transitions verified by re-read).
